_publications._publicationTitle: Dose-dependent effects of focal fractionated irradiation on secondary malignant neoplasms in Nf1 mutant mice.

_contextSnippet: anemia was largely restricted to Nf1+/− mice that received 15 Gy of CI...marked expansion of the red pulp in the spleen...characterized by a predominance of erythroid cells
details: Anemia largely restricted to mice that received 15 Gy of CI, with marked splenic erythroid hyperplasia and ineffective hematopoiesis resembling human MDS
